risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain at High level, indicating ongoing fragility in the operating environment that is constraining project progress and implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: Suspension of IDA Disbursements Due to Political/Governance Crisis
risk_summary: IDA grant disbursements under the project have been suspended pending World Bank decision, likely reflecting deterioration in the political situation in Afghanistan that affects project viability.
evidence_quote: Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Deteriorating Macroeconomic Conditions Linked to Political Crisis
risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk rating has escalated from Low at approval to High currently, reflecting economic instability associated with the political and governance fragility affecting Afghanistan.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Collapse for Project Implementation
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation has deteriorated from Substantial at approval to High risk currently, indicating the implementing agencies (Ministry of Public Works, Ministry of Transport) are unable to effectively execute the project due to governance fragility.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability Substantial High High

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk has escalated from Moderate at approval to High currently, suggesting increased tensions between government, development actors, and affected communities in the project area.
